description: This week's Changelog discusses the shutdown of Cardinal Labs and its impact on developers, the adoption of token 2022 by Jupiter, a tooling round on Qubic for Solana projects, and updates on SPL token issues outlined in SRC 14.
topic_summary: Key updates include the closure of Cardinal Labs [t=7:20], Jupiter's support for token 2022 [t=90:98], a funding initiative for Solana tools on Qubic [t=143:57], and discussions on SPL token improvements in SRC 14 [t=238:07].
